content: Oil prices increased after President Trump declined Iran’s offer to open the Hormuz Strait, keeping the passage shut and restricting tanker traffic. The continued blockade in the strategic waterway has raised concerns over global fuel supply and contributed to the surge in commodity costs.

title: 2026 年年中了，现在开发大型企业级智能体用什么架构方案
content: Senior developers, as of 2026, consider enterprise‑grade AI agents already have mature design patterns. The main choices for core functions such as MCP registration, context handling, and interrupt mechanisms are: 1) using native Vibe coding; 2) directly calling OpenAI’s response‑API; or 3) employing the OpenAI Agent SDK. Traditional agent frameworks, including last year’s LangChain rewrite, are becoming obsolete.

title: “沙发藏钱”丑闻如何威胁南非总统拉马福萨的职位
content: The “Cash‑in‑a‑Sofa” scandal involves allegations that money was hidden in a sofa belonging to a senior official, raising questions about corruption at the highest levels of South Africa’s government. The controversy has prompted investigations, damaged public trust, and intensified calls for accountability. It threatens President Cyril Ramaphosa’s position by providing opponents with evidence to challenge his leadership, potentially leading to political pressure, loss of cabinet support, and calls for his resignation or impeachment.

title: Bun 从 Zig 到 Rust 的迁移已经实锤，下个版本可能成为最后一个 Zig 版本
content: Bun’s founders announced that version 1.3.14, scheduled for release tomorrow, will be the last release built with Zig if the Rust rewrite is merged. The new Rust code has passed all Bun test suites on Linux, Windows, and macOS, and is expected to fix about 200 GitHub issues. Compared to Zig, the Rust version shows no performance regressions and uses similar code, but benefits from Rust’s safer tooling to reduce crashes. No blog post has yet been published about the rewrite.
eventKey: bun-zig-rust-的迁移已经实锤-下个版本可能成为最后一个-zig

title: Marc Andreessen on Builder Culture in the Age of AI
content: Marc Andreessen discusses AI’s influence on culture and economics, noting how fear and hype shape public view while real use demonstrates AI boosts productivity without cutting jobs. He highlights the rise of “AI-native” builders, the shift toward generalist roles, and how companies restructure around this talent. The conversation also covers media’s changing authority, trust, and generational attitudes, offering a broad look at technology’s impact on societal systems.

content: Phel v0.36.0 is a new release of the Lisp-like language running on PHP. title: 史上最大规模IPO逼近，超越SpaceX，28年AI自我迭代，智能爆炸倒计时
content: Anthropic, founded in 2021, is nearing a $1 trillion valuation and may float an IPO that would surpass SpaceX. Its annual recurring revenue surged from $100 million in 2023 to $450 billion in five months of 2026—a 4,500‑fold increase. The company’s rapid growth is driven by two flagship AI products, Claude Code and Cowork, which embed AI into software development and business workflows. Founder Jack Clark forecasts that by 2028 AI may begin self‑improving, triggering an “intelligence explosion” that could reshape industry and economy.

content: OpenAI has expanded stock‑sale limits for employees. After the launch of ChatGPT, many new hires were required to wait two years before selling company shares. The company now allows each employee to sell up to $30 million worth of stock.

content: Economists asked ChatGPT, Gemini, and Claude which jobs are most vulnerable to AI disruption. The models often produced differing answers, indicating that predictions about AI’s impact on employment are not consistently agreed upon.

title: 阿里将把通义千问 AI 接入淘宝，推出智能体式购物服务
content: Alibaba will integrate its Qwen AI model into Taobao, enabling conversational shopping. Users will chat with Qwen to browse and purchase from a catalog of over 4 billion products, receive end‑to‑end assistance and smart recommendations. The Taobao app will also launch an AI shopping assistant featuring virtual try‑on and other features, illustrating the Chinese approach of embedding AI throughout the transaction flow compared to more cautious overseas platforms.
source: Readhub - 每日早报 - 格隆汇
